findings.description: Nancy (Angeline) Davis married William Bremer — the tree's William James Brewer, surname spelling varies — on 12 May 1868 in Newton County, Missouri. The couple relationship already exists in the starting tree with no marriage event; the agent should recover the marriage date and place.
supporting_sources: Missouri, Marriages, 1750-1920 — entry for William Bremer and Nancy Angeline Davis, married 12 May 1868, Newton County, Missouri
